title: dryopteris refracta
intro: Dryopteris refracta, also known as the Narrow Buckler Fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris refracta include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
